{
  "claims": [
    "Filipino Americans have played a pivotal role in advancing equal rights and social equity in U.S. communities.",
    "Filipino Americans were at the forefront of the farmworker movement in the United States.",
    "The Delano Grape Strike led by Filipino American labor leaders is one of the most important labor movements in U.S. history.",
    "Filipino Americans have made vast contributions to the farm labor movement by uniting farm workers in their fight for better wages and working conditions.",
    "Filipino American labor leaders organized over 1,500 farm workers from the Agricultural Workers Organizing Committee in the 1965 Delano Grape Strike.",
    "Filipino Americans have also played an integral role in the fight for housing justice in the United States.",
    "Filipino Americans represent roughly 20% of California’s registered nurses workforce.",
    "The Filipino Young Leaders Program aims to nurture the next generation of diasporic leaders through immersive initiatives and leadership development.",
    "The first recorded presence of Filipinos in the continental United States was on October 18, 1587.",
    "Each year's chosen theme by the Filipino American National Historical Society serves to deepen the public’s understanding of the Filipino American experience."
  ]
}
